questions.text: What does 'Al-Muzzammil' mean?
questions.answer: The Enwrapped One or The Shrouded One (referring to the Prophet SAW).

questions.text: What is the command given to the Prophet (SAW) in the beginning of the Surah?
questions.answer: To stand in prayer during the night, except for a little.

questions.text: What is the recommended duration for the night prayer?
questions.answer: Half of the night, or a little less, or a little more.

questions.text: How should the Quran be recited according to Verse 4?
questions.answer: With measured recitation (Tarteel).

questions.text: What is the 'Heavy Word' mentioned in Verse 5?
questions.answer: The Quran and the responsibilities of the message.

questions.text: Why is the 'rising by night' (Qiyam al-Layl) more effective?
questions.answer: Because it is more striking for the soul and more focused for the word (recitation).

questions.text: What should the Prophet do in the daytime?
questions.answer: He has prolonged occupations/duties during the day.

questions.text: What does 'Tabattul' mean in Verse 8?
questions.answer: Devoting oneself to Allah with complete devotion/detachment from the world.

questions.text: What should the Prophet (SAW) do regarding the insults of the disbelievers?
questions.answer: Be patient over what they say and avoid them with a 'beautiful avoidance' (Hajran Jameela).

questions.text: What has Allah prepared for the deniers of the truth (Verse 12-13)?
questions.answer: Shackles, burning fire, food that chokes, and a painful punishment.

questions.text: What will happen to the earth and mountains on that Day?
questions.answer: They will shake, and the mountains will become a heap of running sand.

questions.text: To whom is the Prophet (SAW) compared in Verse 15 regarding his mission?
questions.answer: To Musa (AS), as a messenger was sent to Pharaoh and he disobeyed.

questions.text: What will happen to children on the Day of Judgment (Verse 17)?
questions.answer: The day will make children white-haired (old) from terror.

questions.text: What will happen to the heaven on that Day?
questions.answer: It will be rent asunder.

questions.text: Why was the length of the night prayer lightened at the end of the Surah?
questions.answer: Because Allah knew there would be those among the believers who are sick, or traveling for business, or fighting in the cause of Allah.

questions.text: What is the final command regarding the Quran in Verse 20?
questions.answer: Recite what is easy for you from the Quran.

questions.text: What are the four other commands in the final verse?
questions.answer: Establish prayer, give Zakat, and loan Allah a goodly loan.

questions.text: What happens to the good that you send before yourselves?
questions.answer: You will find it with Allah as better and greater in reward.

questions.text: What is the final word of the Surah?
questions.answer: Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.

questions.text: True or False: Surah Al-Muzzammil highlights the spiritual preparation needed for the Prophet's mission.
questions.answer: True.
